page_title: CR Neon Genesis Evangelion: The Value of a Miracle is - Complete Visual BOOK
text:
is a visual book for CR Neon Genesis Evangelion 〜The Value of a Miracle is...〜 by Tatsumi Publishing released on 02 June 2007.

Overview

The book is a visual book for the CR Neon Genesis Evangelion 〜The Value of a Miracle is...〜 pachinko machine.

It features the visuals of the pachinko machine, an interview with Akira Ishida, a character guide, an Angel encyclopedia and a REVOLTECH figures section. It came with an Original postcard.
